opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: There is a sharp, stabbing pain in the center of my chest that gets agonizing if I take a deep breath or try to lie down.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain started about a day ago and is so bad when I lie down that I can't sleep — I've been sitting up all night.

symptom_narrative.onset: came on gradually over the last evening, about a day ago
symptom_narrative.duration: about 24 hours, and it's been constant
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: severe — it's agonising when I breathe in deeply or lie flat
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: right in the middle of my chest, behind the breastbone; sometimes it spreads up towards the tops of my shoulders
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, much worse at night when I try to lie down
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting up and leaning forward eases it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: lying flat on my back and taking a deep breath
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I feel a bit hot and feverish; about a week ago I had a sore throat and body aches like a cold
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've never had anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't lie down to sleep at all — I've been sleeping propped up in the recliner and sitting rigidly upright

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: took some earlier for the pain but it barely helped

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; unable to sleep because the pain is unbearable lying down

objective_data_offered.value: 37.8 degrees on my home thermometer, and I feel a bit feverish
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: my heart feels like it's racing, I counted about 100 to 105 beats a minute
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-counted pulse, not a validated device

objective_data_offered.value: I can only stay comfortable sitting upright and leaning forward — I physically can't lean back or lie down
